title: GenderCraft
description: Adds trans blocks and items to Minecraft :3
body:
Trans mod for Minecraft that adds gender-related blocks and items :3

- Adds estradiol, testosterone, and spironolactone
- Adds 5 gender-themed blocks for building (trans and enby)
- Adds gender clinics which spawn in plains and meadows biomes

Trans rights are human rights 🏳️‍⚧️ :3
